title: Memory replication log (pre-work for partition recovery)
resolution: Pre-work complete. Added _replication_log_append() method to MemoryTools — appends NDJSON line to data/memory_replication.log on every L3 mutation. Wired to: insert (write_l3 path), expire (_expire_l3_entry), invalidate (_invalidate_l3_entry), prune (prune_l3_expired). Added scripts/passive/replication_log_rotate.py — daily log rotation with 30-day retention for rotated files. Registered as daily 04:00 cron in PiScheduler (_replication_log_rotate_job). Full partition reconciliation logic deferred until an actual partition incident occurs — see deferred_work in ticket for the follow-on ADR + script design. verify.py PASS.
deferred_work: If/when a partition incident occurs: open new ticket, write docs/adr/006-l3-partition-recovery.md, build reconcile_after_partition.py that reads memory_replication.log + queries Supabase + SQLite for the affected window + resolves conflicts (SQLite-as-primary default).
